name: stickies-search
title: Stickies Search
description: Search Stickies notes by content and quickly create desktop-indicator corner notes.
author: benymng

commands.name: search-stickies
commands.title: Search Stickies
commands.description: Search through the content of all your macOS Stickies notes.

commands.name: create-sticky
commands.title: Create Sticky
commands.description: Create a new square sticky note in the bottom right corner of the current desktop.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
